'''Covah''' was a [[Nothoiin (species)/Legends|Nothoiin]] on the run from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] who hired [[Solomahal/Legends|Solomahal]] to transport him to a safehold in the [[Greater Javin/Legends|Greater Javin]].

{{Char-stub}}
